Wait, let me reconsider. Maybe the purple square doesn't need to reach the ring. Maybe the goal is just to get the white star to visit certain locations, or to move objects in a specific pattern.
Let me look at the level from a different angle. The white star seems to be a "cursor" that I can move around. When I click objects, the white star moves there. The objects on the trail move when the white star passes through them.
Actually, I just realized something. The purple square moved from [17, 53] to [16, 53] to [15, 53] - it's moving 1 row per cycle. But the ring is at row 8, so it needs 7 more moves. At 2 actions per move, that's 14 more actions.

Let me reconsider the goal. Maybe the goal is not to move the purple square to the ring. Maybe the goal is something else, like:
